title: Sylvara Product Strategy
content:
## Product Vision
Sylvara is a full-featured tree service CRM and operations platform, 
built to compete directly with Arbostar. Modular architecture — companies 
pick and pay for the modules they need (scheduling, dispatch, reporting, 
CRM, etc.) a la carte.

## Competitive Context
Iron Tree Service is actively onboarding Arbostar. Sylvara is being built 
to be better across the board, not to avoid overlap. The goal is to outcompete, 
not coexist.

## Release Strategy
Launching to the broader tree service market independently. Iron Tree is no 
longer the primary target — if they want to adopt Sylvara later, that's a 
conversation for then. Building this for commercial release now.

## Current Status
- Stack: Next.js 15 + Fastify + Prisma + PostgreSQL, pnpm/Turborepo monorepo
- Auth: Clerk
- First client target: open market (tree service companies)
- Key stakeholders for Iron Tree reporting work only: John (owner), Eric (ops manager)

## Module Roadmap (planned)
- Scheduling and Daily Dispatch
- Reporting engine (SUMM, Comparable)
- Full CRM (customer records, estimates, job history)
- Additional modules TBD
